description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 5th; Weight 2 lbs.; Price 17,820 gp DESCRIPTION This +1 dueling rapier ends duels quickly and decisively by depriving the wielder’s opponent of her weapon. Following a successful disarm attempt with the weapon, the wielder can move the disarmed weapon 5 feet in any direction as a swift action. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells cat’s grace, mage hand; Cost 9,070 gp
